description.content: Telemetry configuration for metrics, tracing, and access logging

List all Telemetry resources in the specified namespace. A Telemetry resource configures the behavior of the Istio telemetry system, including metrics collection, access logging, and distributed tracing.

query.description: A selector to restrict the list of returned objects by their labels
Maximum number of resources to return
Continue token for paginated list requests

response.name: Successful response containing list of Telemetry resources

description.content: Create a new Telemetry resource in the specified namespace.

response.name: Telemetry resource created
Successful response
Telemetry resource replaced

description.content:
The Istio Telemetry API (telemetry.istio.io) provides configuration resources for managing observability within an Istio service mesh. The Telemetry resource enables flexible configuration of metrics, access logs, and distributed tracing for workloads. It uses the concept of providers to indicate the protocol or integration type, and supports fine-grained control over what telemetry data is collected and where it is sent. These resources are defined as Kubernetes Custom Resource Definitions (CRDs) and are accessed via the Kubernetes API server.
